project: MatFlow — Sprint 3: kids sub-accounts + privacy/socials/payment history
scope: Phase 1 = security gate on Sprint 3 plan. Phase 2 = execute 4 batches (K kids sub-accounts, L privacy+socials, M payment history accuracy, N verify+push). Schema migrations 20260428000006/000007/000008 staged but NOT auto-deployed. One commit per batch. Push at end. Pinned baseline test failures: 4 (must not grow).

stories.title: Security gate: audit Sprint 3 plan v2 for new risks
acceptanceCriteria: Security-reviewer pass on Sprint 3 plan v2 (kids self-relation + 4 endpoints + privacy/socials https-only fields + payment-history accuracy)

Identifies P0/P1 risks: tenant-scope leaks in kids endpoints, parent-child cross-tenant link, passwordHash IS NULL bypass, privacy enumeration via tenant slug, https-only validation bypass, payment refund display confusion
P0/P1 BLOCK execution; P2/P3 logged at docs/AUDIT-SPRINT3-GATE.md and proceed
Verdict committed at docs/AUDIT-SPRINT3-GATE.md

stories.title: Batch K: Kids sub-accounts (schema + 4 endpoints + UI + tests)
acceptanceCriteria: Migration 20260428000006_member_parent_child staged: ADD COLUMN Member.parentMemberId TEXT NULL + ADD COLUMN Member.hasKidsHint BOOLEAN DEFAULT false NOT NULL + CREATE INDEX + ADD CONSTRAINT FK with onDelete: SetNull. Self-relation in schema.prisma named MemberParent (parent/children).
GET /api/member/me/children: requires member session; returns children where parentMemberId=session.user.memberId AND tenantId=session.user.tenantId
GET /api/member/children/[id]: 404 if child.parentMemberId !== session.user.memberId OR tenantId mismatch (uses findFirst with full WHERE)

POST /api/members/[id]/link-child: requireOwner(); validates parent.parentMemberId IS NULL (hierarchy depth cap); validates child.parentMemberId IS NULL AND child.passwordHash IS NULL AND tenantId match; updateMany guards same-tenant; audit action 'member.link.child' with metadata {parentMemberId, childMemberId}

DELETE /api/members/[id]/unlink-child: requireOwner(); updateMany({where:{id:childId, tenantId, parentMemberId:parentId}}, {data:{parentMemberId:null}}); does NOT delete child Member; audit action 'member.unlink.child'

POST /api/members extended: when accountType='kids' OR parentMemberId provided, server synthesises email kid-{nanoid}@no-login.{tenantId}.matflow.local AND sets passwordHash=null; validates parentMemberId belongs to same tenant via findFirst
PATCH /api/member/me whitelist extended to accept hasKidsHint:boolean (currently silently no-ops)
GET /api/members?filter=kids: server-side pushdown adds where.parentMemberId={not:null}

components/member/FamilySection.tsx replaces demo ChildrenSection in app/member/profile/page.tsx; removes Add Child button (replaced with email-gym CTA from billingContactEmail) and removes per-row delete X; whole row tappable
app/member/family/[childId]/page.tsx server component: findFirst({id, parentMemberId, tenantId}) → notFound() if null; read-only render of name/dob/age/belt/attendance
app/dashboard/members/[id]/page.tsx gains: linked-children list, parent badge, owner-only Link/Unlink/Add-child buttons (modal pickers)
components/dashboard/MembersList.tsx: Kids filter chip, calls API with ?filter=kids
Onboarding step 5 PATCHes /api/member/me {hasKidsHint:true}; step 8 success copy reads 'We've flagged your account so the gym can add your children. They'll be in touch.' when hasKidsHint=true

tests/unit/kids-tenant-scope.test.ts: 10 cases covering cross-tenant 404, cross-parent 404, role gates, parentMemberId null invariant, passwordHash null invariant, unlink does not delete, hasKidsHint persists, audit actions, synthesised email regex, hierarchy depth cap
npm run build passes

stories.title: Batch L: Tenant privacy + socials fields (https-only)
acceptanceCriteria: Migration 20260428000007_tenant_privacy_fields staged: Tenant.privacyContactEmail TEXT NULL + Tenant.privacyPolicyUrl TEXT NULL
Migration 20260428000008_tenant_socials_fields staged: Tenant.instagramUrl + facebookUrl + tiktokUrl + youtubeUrl + twitterUrl + websiteUrl all TEXT NULL
All URL fields validated server-side as https:// only via /api/settings PATCH (mirror existing https-only pattern)
Settings page: Legal/Privacy tab gains privacyContactEmail + privacyPolicyUrl inputs; Branding tab gains 6 socials/website inputs
/legal/privacy stays unchanged (public SaaS-level, no tenant context, no ?tenant=slug enumeration vector)
Member profile page (authed) renders Data & Privacy section showing tenant.name as data controller + privacyContactEmail + privacyPolicyUrl link if set
Member profile gym-name card opens client-side modal showing logo + name + visible icon links to all configured socials/website (modal, not nav)
npm run build passes

stories.title: Batch M: Payment history bottom + accuracy
acceptanceCriteria: MemberBillingTab.tsx: subscription/billing CTA on top, payment history at the bottom
GET /api/member/me/payments: findMany scoped to {memberId: session.user.memberId, tenantId: session.user.tenantId}
Payment amount rendered with tenant currency symbol (£ for GBP, $ for USD, € for EUR fallback)
Refunded rows render refundedAmountPence as a SEPARATE labelled value (not subtracted from amountPence)
tests/unit/member-payments-accuracy.test.ts: tenant-scoping enforcement + currency-symbol formatting + refund display semantics
npm run build passes

stories.title: Batch N: Final verification + push
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build clean (zero TypeScript errors)
npm test ≤ 4 pinned baseline failures (Sprint 3 must not add new failures)
Production smoke: /api/member/me/children 401 unauth; /dashboard/memberships 307 unauth; /legal/privacy still SaaS-level public
Per-batch commits pushed to origin/main
Architect THOROUGH verification approved (schema migration + new auth surface + tenant-isolation surface)
6 staged migrations 20260428000003..20260428000008 present but NOT auto-deployed
All previous stories US-301..US-304 have passes:true
